name: testGetJoinedEventOccured
title: testGetJoinedEventOccured
description: Retrieves the occurrence and the occurrence time of a joined event.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Number of the "joined event" corresponds with the return value of testJoin....

parameters.name: occurrenceTime
parameters.description: The variable will be filled with the time when the event occurred.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
